Tool: a2a_send_message_stream

Required args: agent_url: string (Agent Url); message: string (Message)
Optional args: session_id: any (Session Id)

Tool: agent-knowledge_create_snapshot
Use: Create a snapshot (backup) of Elasticsearch indices with comprehensive options and repository management
Required args: snapshot_name: string (Name for the snapshot (must be unique))
Optional args: repository: string (Repository name to store the snapshot); indices: any (Comma-separated list of indices to backup (default: all indices)); ignore_unavailable: boolean (Whether to ignore unavailable indices); include_global_state: boolean (Whether to include cluster global state); wait_for_completion: boolean (Whether to wait for snapshot completion); description: any (Optional description for the snapshot)

Tool: agent-knowledge_restore_snapshot
Use: Restore indices from an Elasticsearch snapshot with comprehensive options and conflict resolution
Required args: snapshot_name: string (Name of the snapshot to restore from)
Optional args: repository: string (Repository containing the snapshot); indices: any (Comma-separated list of indices to restore (default: all from snapshot)); ignore_unavailable: boolean (Whether to ignore unavailable indices); include_global_state: boolean (Whether to restore cluster global state); wait_for_completion: boolean (Whether to wait for restore completion); rename_pattern: any (Pattern to rename restored indices (e.g., 'restored_%s')); index_settings: any (JSON string of index settings to override)

Tool: agent-knowledge_list_snapshots
Use: List all snapshots in an Elasticsearch repository with detailed information and status
Required args: none
Optional args: repository: string (Repository name to list snapshots from); verbose: boolean (Whether to show detailed information for each snapshot)

Tool: agent-knowledge_create_index_metadata
Use: Create metadata documentation for an Elasticsearch index to ensure proper governance and documentation
Required args: index_name: string (Name of the index to document); description: string (Detailed description of the index purpose and content); purpose: string (Primary purpose and use case for this index)
Optional args: data_types: array (Types of data stored in this index (e.g., 'documents', 'logs', 'metrics')); usage_pattern: string (How the index is accessed (e.g., 'read-heavy', 'write-heavy', 'mixed')); retention_policy: string (Data retention policy and lifecycle management); related_indices: array (Names of related or dependent indices); tags: array (Tags for categorizing and organizing indices); created_by: string (Team or person responsible for this index)

Tool: agent-knowledge_update_index_metadata
Use: Update existing metadata documentation for an Elasticsearch index
Required args: index_name: string (Name of the index to update metadata for)
Optional args: description: any (Updated description of the index purpose and content); purpose: any (Updated primary purpose and use case); data_types: any (Updated types of data stored in this index); usage_pattern: any (Updated access pattern); retention_policy: any (Updated data retention policy); related_indices: any (Updated related or dependent indices); tags: any (Updated tags for categorization); updated_by: string (Person or team making this update)

Tool: agent-knowledge_delete_index_metadata
Use: Delete metadata documentation for an Elasticsearch index
Required args: index_name: string (Name of the index to remove metadata for)
Optional args: none

Tool: agent-knowledge_delete_document
Use: Delete a document from Elasticsearch index by document ID
Required args: index: string (Name of the Elasticsearch index containing the document); doc_id: string (Document ID to delete from the index)
Optional args: none

Tool: agent-knowledge_get_document
Use: Retrieve a specific document from Elasticsearch index by document ID
Required args: index: string (Name of the Elasticsearch index containing the document); doc_id: string (Document ID to retrieve from the index)
Optional args: none

Tool: agent-knowledge_index_document
Use: Index a document into Elasticsearch with smart duplicate prevention and intelligent document ID generation. 💡 RECOMMENDED: Use 'create_document_template' tool first to generate a proper document structure and avoid validation errors.
Required args: index: string (Name of the Elasticsearch index to store the document); document: object (Document data to index as JSON object. 💡 RECOMMENDED: Use 'create_document_template' tool first to generate proper document format.)
Optional args: doc_id: any (Optional document ID - if not provided, smart ID will be generated); validate_schema: boolean (Whether to validate document structure for knowledge base format); check_duplicates: boolean (Check for existing documents with similar title before indexing); force_index: boolean (Force indexing even if potential duplicates are found. 💡 TIP: Set to True if content is genuinely new and not in knowledge base to avoid multiple tool calls); use_ai_similarity: boolean (Use AI to analyze content similarity and provide intelligent recommendations)

Tool: agent-knowledge_validate_document_schema
Use: Validate document structure against knowledge base schema and provide formatting guidance
Required args: document: object (Document object to validate against knowledge base schema format)
Optional args: none

Tool: agent-knowledge_create_document_template
Use: Create a properly structured document template for knowledge base with AI-generated metadata and formatting
Required args: title: string (Document title for the knowledge base entry)
Optional args: content: string (Document content for AI analysis and metadata generation); priority: string (Priority level for the document); source_type: string (Type of source content); tags: array (Additional manual tags (will be merged with AI-generated tags)); summary: string (Brief summary description of the document content); key_points: array (Additional manual key points (will be merged with AI-generated points)); related: array (List of related document IDs or references); use_ai_enhancement: boolean (Use AI to generate intelligent tags and key points)

Tool: agent-knowledge_create_index
Use: Create a new Elasticsearch index with optional mapping and settings configuration
Required args: index: string (Name of the new Elasticsearch index to create); mapping: object (Index mapping configuration defining field types and properties)
Optional args: settings: any (Optional index settings for shards, replicas, analysis, etc.)

Tool: agent-knowledge_delete_index
Use: Delete an Elasticsearch index and all its documents permanently
Required args: index: string (Name of the Elasticsearch index to delete)
Optional args: none

Tool: agent-knowledge_list_indices
Use: List all available Elasticsearch indices with document count and size statistics
Required args: none
Optional args: none

Tool: agent-knowledge_search
